boundaries: This changelog/feed republishes compact authority-ledger events; it does not recount underlying evidence URLs.
Evidence references are relative Packrift execution references, not absolute local paths.
RSS, Atom, JSON Feed, ActivityStream, sitemap, and IndexNow are discovery surfaces, not referring-domain proof.

count_treatment.separate_feed_third_party_readbacks: count only after direct public verification of external profile/archive/listing URLs for this feed host

title: Packrift Authority Changelog Feed
